meta.description: Phase 5 router performance guardrails (CPU deterministic benchmark)
meta.pipeline_contract: Applies to v6 VLMPipeline stage-order benchmarks run by scripts/benchmark_router_phase5.py with mocked model hooks.
meta.derivation_method: Calibrated from repeated benchmark artifacts logs/phase5_router_benchmark_run*.json using per-metric observed maxima with +2% headroom, rounded to 2 decimals.
meta.variance_note: Thresholds are environment-calibrated and intentionally tight for regression detection.
